threats.title: VerdantBamboo Deploys BSD Variant of BRICKSTORM on Linux Appliances
threats.summary: A China-nexus cyber espionage group has been observed deploying a BSD variant of a known backdoor called BRICKSTORM, as well as two other malware families codenamed PLENET (aka GRIMBOLT) and AGENTPSD to target Linux systems. threats.title: UNC3753 Used Vishing and Physical Intrusions in U.S. Data Theft Extortion Campaign
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a financially motivated data theft extortion campaign that has targeted dozens of organizations across professional, legal, and financial services in the U.S. between January and May 2026. threats.title: VS Code Adds 2-Hour Extension Auto-Update Delay to Limit Supply Chain Attacks
